plugins.name: daily
plugins.description: Personal daily tools: TODO management, Apple Reminders sync, filtered Gmail unread summary, and conversation archiving.

plugins.name: writing
plugins.description: Default writing standards for English prose. Auto-triggers on all writing tasks — emails, drafts, posts, paper prose. 12 canonical rules (from agent-style, CC BY 4.0) plus 5 additions for page-capped conference papers.
